nasb.text: and I found him to be accused over questions about their Law, but under no accusation deserving death or imprisonment.

esv.text: I found that he was being accused about questions of their law, but charged with nothing deserving death or imprisonment.

cnv.text: 我發現他被控告，是為了他們律法上的問題，並沒有甚麼該死該綁的罪名。

ccb.text: 发现他被控告与他们的律法有关，他并没有犯该被监禁或处死的罪。

csbs.text: 我发现他被控告，与他们律法上的争议问题有关，并没有任何该死或该被捆锁的罪行。
